_note: The pivot is THE WATERLINE POINT — blit the cell at the surface and the baked underwater tint does the dipping. lineAttach is the stem-top pixel as an offset FROM THE PIVOT: dy = -6 + (the pose's px-below-waterline, 0 while airborne) — the same formula the rig's renderer uses for its top row, read from its own POSE table. ms per state comes from STATES.
